name: Beszel-Agent
description: Beszel Agent runs on each server you want to monitor. It collects system metrics (CPU, memory, disk, network) and Docker container stats, then reports them back to the Beszel Hub.

paths.name: Agent Data
paths.description: Persistent storage for the Beszel Agent. Stores agent state and configuration data.

paths.name: Docker Socket
paths.description: Read-only access to the Docker socket. Required for monitoring Docker containers on this host.

variables.name: Hub URL
variables.description: The URL of your Beszel Hub. Use the local IP of the server where the Hub is running (e.g. http://192.168.1.100:8090).

variables.name: Listen Port
variables.description: The port the agent listens on. Must match the port entered when adding the system in the Beszel Hub UI. Default is 45876.

variables.name: Public Key
variables.description: The public SSH key generated by the Beszel Hub. Copy it from the 'System hinzufügen' dialog in the Hub UI (Öffentlicher Schlüssel field).

variables.name: Token
variables.description: The authentication token generated by the Beszel Hub. Copy it from the 'System hinzufügen' dialog in the Hub UI (Token field).
